required_env_vars.name: CALCOM_API_KEY
required_env_vars.description: Cal.com V2 API key prefixed with cal_ for Bearer token authentication
required_env_vars.source: Cal.com Dashboard → Settings → API Keys → Create V2 API Key

required_env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME
required_env_vars.description: Cal.com username for coach booking links
required_env_vars.source: Cal.com account username from profile settings

required_env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_EVENT_SLUG
required_env_vars.description: Event type slug for coaching sessions (e.g., 60min)
required_env_vars.source: Cal.com event type settings → Event slug field

tasks.name: Create CalcomBooking TypeScript types
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript interfaces for Cal.com V2 API booking response structure to ensure type safety across the API client

constraints: Must match Cal.com V2 API response structure
Include required fields: id, title, startTime, endTime, status, attendees, meetingUrl
Use ISO 8601 date strings for timestamps

tasks.input_state: No Cal.com types exist in codebase
tasks.output_state: calcom-types.ts exists with CalcomBooking, CalcomAttendee, and CalcomBookingsResponse interfaces
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/calcom-types.ts with exported interfaces matching V2 API structure
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/calcom-types.ts && grep -q 'export interface CalcomBooking' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/calcom-types.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create API client skeleton with server-only directive

action.target: calcom-api.ts with server-only directive and imports

tasks.purpose: Establish the API client file structure with server-only directive to prevent accidental client-side usage

constraints: Must start with 'server-only' directive
Must use React cache() for request-level caching
Function signature: fetchUpcomingBookings(): Promise<CalcomBooking[] | null>

tasks.output_state: calcom-api.ts exists with imports and empty fetchUpcomingBookings function skeleton
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists with server-only directive and exports cached fetchUpcomingBookings function
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/calcom-api.ts && grep -q "import 'server-only'" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/calcom-api.ts && grep -q 'export const fetchUpcomingBookings' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/calcom-api.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add Bearer token authentication headers

action.target: fetch call with Authorization and cal-api-version headers

tasks.purpose: Implement Bearer token authentication with V2 API version header for Cal.com API access

constraints: API endpoint: GET https://api.cal.com/v2/bookings?status=accepted
Authorization header: Bearer {CALCOM_API_KEY}
cal-api-version header: 2024-08-13
Must validate CALCOM_API_KEY exists
Must check CALCOM_API_KEY starts with 'cal_' prefix

tasks.input_state: calcom-api.ts exists with empty fetchUpcomingBookings function
tasks.output_state: fetchUpcomingBookings function makes authenticated fetch call to Cal.com V2 API
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function makes fetch call with correct headers and returns response data

patterns.expected_action: warn and return null if missing

tasks.name: Add Next.js fetch caching with 5-minute revalidation

action.target: fetch options with next revalidate configuration

tasks.purpose: Enable 5-minute response caching to reduce API calls and improve performance

constraints: Use Next.js fetch with next: { revalidate: 300 } for 5-minute cache
Cache should be request-level using React cache()
Must not cache error responses

tasks.input_state: fetchUpcomingBookings makes authenticated API call without caching
tasks.output_state: fetchUpcomingBookings caches successful responses for 5 minutes
tasks.acceptance_criterion: fetch call includes next: { revalidate: 300 } option and function is wrapped with cache()

tasks.name: Add error handling with graceful degradation

action.target: try-catch block with null return on error

tasks.purpose: Handle API failures gracefully by returning null instead of throwing, enabling fallback UI rendering

constraints: Return null on any error (network, auth, parse)
Must not throw errors - graceful degradation pattern
Check for missing CALCOM_API_KEY and return null with warning
Validate response.ok before parsing JSON

tasks.input_state: fetchUpcomingBookings makes cached API call without error handling
tasks.output_state: fetchUpcomingBookings wraps API call in try-catch and returns null on failures
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function returns null on errors and validates CALCOM_API_KEY existence
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'try {' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/calcom-api.ts && grep -q 'return null' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/calcom-api.ts && grep -q 'CALCOM_API_KEY' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/calcom-api.ts && pnpm typecheck

patterns.expected_action: warn and return null if missing

tasks.name: Add logging for API errors and warnings

action.target: logger calls for error and warning scenarios

tasks.purpose: Enable debugging and monitoring of Cal.com API integration issues

constraints: Log warning when CALCOM_API_KEY is missing
Log error when API call fails with status code
Log error when JSON parsing fails
Include context object with error details

tasks.input_state: fetchUpcomingBookings handles errors but does not log them
tasks.output_state: fetchUpcomingBookings logs warnings for missing config and errors for API failures
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Logger is imported and used in error paths with appropriate log levels

tasks.name: Write unit tests for fetchUpcomingBookings
tasks.purpose: Verify API client behavior with mocked Cal.com responses for success and error scenarios

constraints: Mock fetch with vi.stubGlobal or vi.mock
Test successful API response returns bookings array
Test missing CALCOM_API_KEY returns null with warning
Test API error response returns null
Test non-ok response returns null
Test JSON parse error returns null

tasks.input_state: calcom-api.ts is complete but has no tests
tasks.output_state: calcom-api.test.ts exists with 5+ test cases covering success and error paths
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test file exists with passing tests for success, missing env, API error, and parse error scenarios
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/calcom-api.test.ts && pnpm --filter web test:unit -- calcom-api.test.ts && pnpm typecheck
